properties.name: Kapitan Miyong
properties.note: Nearby streetsnamed after heroes. Emilio Aguinaldo is historically referred to as "Capitan Miyong", when he was a Capitan Municipal (today's equivalent of mayor) for Noveleta, Cavite. Hence, "Capt" stands for "capitan",not "captain"
